title: Redux Clone
description: A responsive frontend clone inspired by the Redux website, built using HTML and CSS with a focus on layout and design.

title: Razor Clone
description: A responsive clone of the Razorpay landing page showcasing modern UI design using HTML and CSS.

title: Microsoft Clone
description: A frontend clone of the Microsoft homepage featuring responsive layouts and modern styling techniques.

title: Kamya Food
description: A responsive food ordering website frontend designed using HTML and CSS with an attractive user interface.

title: Student Management System
description: A web-based application to manage student records with CRUD operations using Java Servlets, JSP, and Hibernate.

title: Online Quiz Console Application
description: A console-based quiz application with score tracking and database connectivity using Java and JDBC.

title: Leave Management System
description: A full-stack leave management system with employee authentication, leave requests, approvals, and PostgreSQL database integration.

title: Bank Management System
description: A banking application supporting customer management, account operations, and transaction handling using Spring Boot and PostgreSQL.

title: Job Portal & Applicant Tracking System
description: A full-stack recruitment platform where recruiters can post jobs, manage applications, and track candidates, while applicants can search and apply for jobs securely.
